---
title: "payload.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/payload.py"
loc: 35
complexity: 4
logic_score: 8.53
style_score: 3.49
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.21
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating IntentPayload, __post_init__. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 12 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [dataclasses](file://dataclasses)
- [types](file://types)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `IntentPayload`
- `__post_init__`
- `__repr__`
- `to_dict`
